title: ISBA/31/C/L.6
text:
International Seabed Authority   ISBA/31/C/L.6  
  
Council 
 
Distr.: Limited  
6 March 2026  
 
Original: English  
 
26-03307 (E)    1 20326     
*2603307* 

Thirty-first session  
Council session, part I  
Kingston, 9 –20 March 2026  
Item 10 of the provisional agenda * 
Consideration, with a view to approval, of applications 
for extension of a contract for exploration, if any  

Draft decision of the Council relating to an application 
for extension of the contract for exploration for 
polymetallic nodules between Deep Ocean Resources 
Development Co. Ltd. and the Authority 

 The Council of the International Seabed Authority ,  
 Acting  upon the recommendation of the Legal and Technical Commission, 1  
 Recalling  that, on 20 June 2001, Deep Ocean Resources Development Co. Ltd. 
entered into a 15 -year contract for exploration for polymetallic nodules with the 
International Seabed Authority,  
 Recalling also  that the contract was extended for a period of five years to 
19 June 2021 2 and for a further five years to 19 June 2026, 3  
 Noting  that, on 9 December 2025, the Secretary -General of the Authority 
received an application for an additional five -year extension of the contract,  
 Recalling  section 1, paragraph 9, of the annex to the Agreement relating to the 
Implementation of Part XI of the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea 
of 10 December 1982, 4  
 Recalling also  the decision of the Council of the Authority relating to the 
procedures and criteria for the extension of an approved plan of work for exploration 
pursuant to section 1, paragraph 9, of the annex to the Agreement, 5  
__________________ 
 *  ISBA/31/C/L.1 . 
 1  ISBA/31/C/9 . 
 2  ISBA/22/C/25 . 
 3  ISBA/26/C/52 . 
 4  United Nations, Treaty Series , vol. 1836, No. 31364.  
 5  ISBA/21/C/19 . 
ISBA/31/C/L.6  
 
26-03307 2/2 
 
 Considering  the report and recommendations of the Legal and Technical 
Commission relating to the application by Deep Ocean Resources Development Co. 
Ltd. for extension of the contract, 6  
 1. Decides  to approve the application for extension of the contract;  
 2. Requests  the Secretary -General to take the steps necessary to execute the 
extension of the contract, with effect from 20 June 2026, by signature of an agreement 
in the form set out in appendix II to the annex to the decision of the Council of the 
International Sea bed Authority mentioned above; 7  
 3. Also requests  the Secretary -General to report to the Council at its next 
session on the status of the extension agreement.  
 
__________________ 
 6  ISBA/31/C/9 . 
 7  See ISBA/21/C/19 .
